events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario states: ">360° of bends between pull points" in EMT installation. NEC 358.26 states that there shall not be more than the equivalent of four quarter bends (360 degrees total) between pull points, junction boxes, or conduit bodies. So >360° is non-compliant.

Decision: fail
Risk: medium (could cause conductor damage during pulling, difficulty in pulling)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective
Percent complete: rough-complete, maybe 85%
Value: >360 (the degree of bends)
Confidence: high, 0.95
Findings: more than 360° of bends between pull points
Actions: rework to reduce bends to ≤360° between pull points, add pull point/junction box
References: NEC 358.26
